Title: Prohibits a gas corporation, electric corporation or municipality from charging more than three percent on an annual utility bill
Summary: Prohibits a gas corporation, electric corporation or municipality from charging more than three percent on an annual utility bill absent a showing that the charge is necessary to maintain the reliability and safety of the grid.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to capping the amount paid towards utility bills on an annual basis
